ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "station_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station location */,
  "station_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the station */,
  "num_docks" INTEGER /* Total number of docks at the station */,
  "is_installed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the station is installed and operational */,
  "is_renting" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the station is currently renting bikes */,
  "is_returning" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the station is currently accepting bike returns */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for issues related to the station */,
  "capacity_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for low bike availability to trigger alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the report is for */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the report */,
  "last_reported" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of the last reported status */,
  "num_bikes_available" INTEGER /* Number of bikes available at the station */,
  "num_ebikes_available" INTEGER /* Number of electric bikes available at the station */,
  "num_docks_disabled" INTEGER /* Number of disabled docks at the station */,
  "num_bikes_disabled" INTEGER /* Number of disabled bikes at the station */,
  "num_docks_available" INTEGER /* Number of docks available at the station */,
  "weather_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the weather conditions during the report period */,
  "event_summary" TEXT /* Summary of any city events happening during the report period */,
  "maintenance_needed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if maintenance is needed based on the report */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Alert level (e.g., low, medium, high) based on the report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, maintenance team, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for quick contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES station_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage pattern */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station report the pattern is based on */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday, etc.) */,
  "is_peak" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is during peak hours */,
  "is_low_peak" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is during low-peak hours */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the usage pattern */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the usage pattern */,
  "average_bikes_available" REAL /* Average number of bikes available during the pattern */,
  "average_docks_available" REAL /* Average number of docks available during the pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_patterns_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES station_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station report the data is associated with */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition at the time of the report */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the report */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of the report */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of the report */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation at the time of the report */,
  "city_event" TEXT /* City event happening at the time of the report */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the city event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the city event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES station_reports ("report_id")
)
